name: apaleo
description: API-first hotel property management system (PMS) with open REST & webhooks.

seo.title: apaleo — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: apaleo: API-first hotel property management system (PMS) with open REST & webhooks.

when_to_use: Custom PMS integration via open REST API for hotels
Marketplace app connecting to hotel property system
Revenue management system reading live hotel data
Channel manager sync via apaleo open APIs

cons: Smaller chain focus may not scale
review.verdict: The PMS to pick if you plan to build custom hotel tech—legacy PMS vendors will fight you on integrations.
review.best_for: Boutique and tech-forward hotel groups building custom guest-facing apps
review.not_for: Large chains needing every enterprise PMS feature out of the box
